title: vision-eval expectation manifest
description: The oracle for one vision.md fixture: what a correct /vision run must produce. Graded by the vision-eval harness (autonomous-build-4vj.2+). One expect.json sits beside each fixture's vision.md.

fixture.description: Directory slug of the fixture (matches the containing folder name).

axis.description: The coverage-relevant axis this fixture exercises (see README).

archetypeProfile.description: The deferred per-archetype profile this fixture maps to (docs/PLAN_CONCERNS.md 'per-archetype profiles'). Profiles are not yet implemented; this records the intended mapping.

expectIncomplete.description: Whether a correct /vision run must write incomplete:true (the plan BLOCKS /decompose). True for adversarial fixtures.

concernApplicability.description: Derived applicability per concernId, per docs/PLAN_CONCERNS.md 'Applicability' table. Tiers: 'required' | 'optional' | 'excluded' (the doc's excluded-by-default when the vision does not elevate it). For an incomplete-by-empty-sections fixture, applicability is underivable — use 'underivable' for every concern.

mustHaves.description: One entry per §3 must-have the fixture states, in document order, with the ID /vision should assign and whether it must map to >=1 feature in coverage[].

mustMapToFeature.description: True if a correct plan maps this must-have to >=1 feature. False only for an adversarial must-have that should instead surface a blocking openQuestion (excluded by a non-goal, or no matching formula).

blocking.description: Expected blocking signals (each forces incomplete:true). Empty when expectIncomplete is false.

gate.description: Which /vision gate (skills/vision/SKILL.md steps 6.6/6.7/8.6 + stopping conditions) must fire.
